content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(8, 9, 0), (3, 7, 1), (7, 9, 1), (3, 6, 2), (2, 5, 3), (7, 8, 5), (0, 2, 6), (1, 3, 6), (1, 2, 7), (2, 9, 7), (0, 8, 10), (1, 6, 10), (1, 9, 10), (6, 9, 11), (0, 4, 14), (1, 5, 18), (0, 3, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 3 exactly at time 19.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (8, 9, 0) has node 8 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 7, 1) has node 3 and time 1. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (7, 9, 1) has node 7 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 6, 2) has node 3 and time 2. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 5, 3) has node 2 and time 3. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (7, 8, 5) has node 7 and time 5. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 2, 6) has node 0 and time 6. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 3, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 2, 7) has node 1 and time 7. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (2, 9, 7) has node 2 and time 7. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 8, 10) has node 0 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 6, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 9, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 9, 11) has node 6 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 4, 14) has node 0 and time 14. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 5, 18) has node 1 and time 18. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 3, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 3.

Now we have collected all nodes that are linked with node 3 at time 19.

Answer: [3, 7, 1, 9, 2, 5, 6, 8, 10, 11, 4, 5, 3]
